{"query":"FROM .ds-logs-endpoint.events.registry-default-* | WHERE registry.path LIKE \"*MicrosoftUpdater*\" OR registry.path LIKE \"*\\\\Run\\\\*\" | KEEP @timestamp, host.name, process.name, registry.path, registry.data.strings | SORT @timestamp ASC | LIMIT 30"}
ERROR: MPC -32603: HTTP status client error (400 Bad Request) for url (https://10.3.20.1:9200/_query)

{"query":"FROM .ds-logs-endpoint.events.process-default-* | WHERE process.name == \"updater.exe\" OR process.parent.name == \"updater.exe\" | KEEP @timestamp, host.name, user.name, process.name, process.parent.name, process.command_line, process.executable | SORT @timestamp ASC | LIMIT 50"}

{"query":"FROM .ds-logs-network_traffic.http-default-* | WHERE url.domain LIKE \"*update*\" OR url.domain LIKE \"*f1leshare*\" OR url.domain LIKE \"*windowsupd*\" OR url.domain LIKE \"*miccosoft*\" | KEEP @timestamp, host.name, url.full, url.domain, url.path, http.request.method, destination.ip, user_agent.original | SORT @timestamp ASC | LIMIT 100"}
